name: Signature: Create

description.en: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.
description.de: Sende eine rechtsverbindliche Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und bestätigt das Dokument mit einem Klick.
description.fr: Envoyez une demande de signature juridiquement engageante. Le signataire recoit un e-mail et confirme le document en un clic.
description.es: Envia una solicitud de firma con validez legal. La persona firmante recibe un correo y confirma el documento con un clic.
description.ro: Trimite o cerere de semnatura cu valoare legala. Semnatarul primeste un e-mail si confirma documentul cu un singur clic.

bot: Creates an on-chain signature request and notifies the signer by email. First ask the user to upload or drop the document file — show a file upload embed, do NOT ask for a URL. The document hash is auto-computed from the uploaded file. If a document is already pinned on the desk, use it directly. Then collect: document title, signer wallet address, signer email, and optional deadline.

description.en: What document needs to be signed?
Who needs to sign this document?
description.es: Quien tiene que firmar este documento?
description.ro: Cine trebuie sa semneze acest document?

description.en: Set a deadline for the signature request.
description.fr: Definissez une date limite pour la demande de signature.
description.es: Define una fecha limite para la solicitud de firma.
description.ro: Seteaza un termen limita pentru cererea de semnatura.

inputs.name: Title

description.en: Title of the document to be signed.
description.es: Titulo del documento que se va a firmar.

inputs.bot: Short, clear document title — e.g. 'Freelance Agreement Q2', 'NDA with Acme Corp'.

inputs.name: Document Hash

description.en: SHA-256 hash of the document. Proves the document hasn't been altered.
description.de: SHA-256-Hash des Dokuments. Beweist, dass das Dokument nicht verändert wurde.
description.fr: Hash SHA-256 du document. Prouve que le document n a pas ete modifie.
description.es: Hash SHA-256 del documento. Demuestra que el documento no ha sido alterado.
description.ro: Hash-ul SHA-256 al documentului. Dovedeste ca documentul nu a fost modificat.

inputs.bot: SHA-256 fingerprint of the document. Auto-filled when the user uploads the file — do not ask for this.

inputs.name: Document

description.en: Upload the PDF document to be signed. The SHA-256 fingerprint will be computed automatically.
description.de: Lade das zu unterzeichnende PDF-Dokument hoch. Der SHA-256-Fingerabdruck wird automatisch berechnet.
description.fr: Televersez le document PDF a signer. L empreinte SHA-256 sera calculee automatiquement.
description.es: Sube el documento PDF que hay que firmar. La huella SHA-256 se calculara automaticamente.
description.ro: Incarca documentul PDF care trebuie semnat. Amprenta SHA-256 va fi calculata automat.

inputs.bot: Ask the user to upload or drop the document file — show a file upload embed. If a document is already pinned on the desk, use it. Do NOT ask for a URL.

inputs.name: Deadline

description.en: How long does the signer have to sign?
description.de: Wie lange hat der Unterzeichner Zeit zum Unterzeichnen?
description.fr: Combien de temps le signataire a-t-il pour signer ?
description.es: Cuanto tiempo tiene la persona firmante para firmar?
description.ro: Cat timp are semnatarul la dispozitie pentru a semna?

inputs.bot: Deadline in hours. Use 0 for no deadline, 24 for one day, 168 for a week.

inputs.name: Signer Address

description.es: Direccion de la wallet de la persona firmante.

inputs.bot: MultiversX wallet address (erd1...) of the person who needs to sign.

inputs.name: Signer Email

description.en: Signer's email address. They will receive a signing link.
description.de: E-Mail-Adresse des Unterzeichners. Er erhält einen Link zum Unterzeichnen.
description.fr: Adresse e-mail du signataire. Il recevra un lien de signature.
description.es: Correo de la persona firmante. Recibira un enlace para firmar.
description.ro: Adresa de e-mail a semnatarului. Va primi un link pentru semnare.

inputs.bot: Email address of the person who needs to sign the document.

inputs.name: Signer Name
inputs.bot: Full name of the signer, used in the notification email.

inputs.name: Signer WhatsApp

description.en: Signer's WhatsApp number (optional). If provided, they will also receive the signing link via WhatsApp.
description.de: WhatsApp-Nummer des Unterzeichners (optional). Falls angegeben, erhält er den Signing-Link auch via WhatsApp.
description.fr: Numero WhatsApp du signataire (optionnel). S il est fourni, il recevra le lien de signature via WhatsApp.
description.es: Numero de WhatsApp del firmante (opcional). Si se proporciona, tambien recibira el enlace de firma por WhatsApp.
description.ro: Numarul de WhatsApp al semnatarului (optional). Daca este furnizat, va primi linkul de semnare si prin WhatsApp.

inputs.bot: WhatsApp phone number of the signer (international format, e.g. +43123456789). Optional — skip if not available.

success.en: Signature request sent! The signer will receive an email with a signing link.
success.de: Signaturanfrage gesendet! Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail mit einem Link zum Unterzeichnen.
success.fr: Demande de signature envoyee ! Le signataire recevra un e-mail avec un lien de signature.
success.es: Solicitud de firma enviada. La persona firmante recibira un correo con el enlace para firmar.
success.ro: Cererea de semnatura a fost trimisa! Semnatarul va primi un e-mail cu linkul de semnare.
